redacted_by_govfolio: 2026-07-06 (orchestrator, before commit): DS_BEM_CANDIDATO free-text asset descriptions in this file contained a full apartment address with unit number and CEP, a second street address, a vehicle license plate, and a personal landline phone number, all for one real named 2022 federal-deputy candidate from Alagoas.
